name: youtube-sentinel
description: Windows YouTube update monitor with AI briefs and Telegram delivery.
author: Codex

scripts.dev:main: tsup src/main/main.ts src/main/preload.ts src/worker/index.ts --format cjs --target node22 --out-dir .build --watch --sourcemap --external electron
scripts.build:main: tsup src/main/main.ts src/main/preload.ts src/worker/index.ts --format cjs --target node22 --out-dir .build --sourcemap --external electron
scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:main
